acceptanceCriteria.text: Credit cost is shown to the user before each premium action
Failed scoring jobs trigger automatic refund
Bonus credits expire after the configured window

snapshot.description: Free / Starter / Pro plans with monthly credit grants. Credit top-ups via Stripe. Reserve/consume/refund wallet model backed by append-only ledger. Bonus credits with expiry. Credit cost shown before each premium action.
snapshot.title: Module 11: Plans, pricing, and wallet
